texto: Sometimes you don’t need to do anything really courageous to feel like a hero. Sometimes all you have to do is live your life and claim it. Then you can get to a certain moment when you can stand somewhere and think about where you’ve been and where you are now and the journey you’ve traveled to get there. Sometimes, that’s all you need to do.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Diana Bletter: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Sometimes you don’t need to do anything really courageous to feel like a hero. Sometimes all you …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, inspirational-life, sometimes pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de viagem e inspiracao.
